set_value.name: $useMK4LivePool
set_value.exact: if $params? and $params.$SearchPool? and $params.$SearchPool == 'mk4_supply' then true else false

set_value.name: $useMK42LivePool
set_value.exact: if $params? and $params.$SearchPool? and $params.$SearchPool == 'mk4_supply_v2' then true else false

set_value.name: $homeBase
set_value.exact: if $params? and $params.$HomeBase? then @$params.$HomeBase else (if $ship? and global.$GT_AIParameters? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$HomeBase? then @global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$HomeBase else (if $ship? and $ship.defaultorder and $ship.defaultorder.$home? then @$ship.defaultorder.$home else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)))

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $homeBase? and $homeBase.isclass.station then $homeBase.sector else (if $homeBase? and $homeBase.isclass.sector then $homeBase else (if $ship? and $ship.defaultorder and $ship.defaultorder.$home? and $ship.defaultorder.$home.sector? then @$ship.defaultorder.$home.sector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)))

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $ship? and $ship.defaultorder and $ship.defaultorder.$home? and $ship.defaultorder.$home.sector? then @$ship.defaultorder.$home.sector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared stale live-active state for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (startedAt=' + (if $liveStartedAt? then $liveStartedAt else 'null') + ', age=' + player.age + ')'

'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared stale clearance-active state for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (startedAt=' + (if $clearanceStartedAt? then $clearanceStartedAt else 'null') + ', age=' + player.age + ')'

'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared stale MK4 live-active state for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (startedAt=' + (if $mk4LiveStartedAt? then $mk4LiveStartedAt else 'null') + ', age=' + player.age + ')'
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared stale MK4 queued marker for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ')'
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared stale live queued marker for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ')'

do_if.value: $enqueueAllowed and $ship? and $ship.exists and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$PhaseStateByShip? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$PhaseStateByShip.{$ship}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest: Cleared orphaned phase-state marker for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ')'
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest age=' + player.age + ' ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' mode=' + $searchMode + ' phase=' + $targetPhase + ' home=' + $homeName + ' -> ENQUEUED ' + $targetPhase
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchRequest age=' + player.age + ' ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' mode=' + $searchMode + ' -> REJECTED reason=' + $rejectReason

do_if.value: not $enqueueAllowed and $ship? and $ship.exists and ($rejectReason == 'CacheQueued' or $rejectReason == 'LiveQueued' or $rejectReason == 'MK4LiveQueued' or $rejectReason == 'MK42LiveQueued' or $rejectReason == 'ClearanceQueued' or $rejectReason == 'LiveActiveShips' or $rejectReason == 'MK4LiveActiveShips' or $rejectReason == 'MK42LiveActiveShips' or $rejectReason == 'ClearanceActiveShips')

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $entry? and $entry.$HomeSector? then @$entry.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] DispatchCacheSearchGo: Sending GT_Search_Go to ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ', phase=cache)'

'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchMK4LiveSearchGo: Cleared stale MK4 active slot owner=' + (if $mk4ActiveShip? then $mk4ActiveShip.idcode else 'null') + ' startedAt=' + (if $mk4ActiveStartedAt? then $mk4ActiveStartedAt else 'null') + ' age=' + player.age

'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchMK4LiveSearchGo: Cleared orphaned MK4LiveHomeActive home=' + (if $mk4OrphanHome? and $mk4OrphanHome.knownname? then @$mk4OrphanHome.knownname else '?') + ' owner=' + (if $mk4OrphanOwner? then $mk4OrphanOwner.idcode else 'null')

do_while.value: $mk4HomeScanBudget gt 0 and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActive lt global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MaxConcurrentMK4Live and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveHomesQueue.count gt 0

do_if.value: $homeSector? and $homeSector.exists and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4.{$homeSector}.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] DispatchMK4LiveSearchGo: Sending GT_Search_Go to ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ', mk4live)'

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $entry? and $entry.$HomeSector? then @$entry.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] DispatchClearanceSearchGo: Sending GT_Search_Go to ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ', clearance)'

'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: Cleared stale live-active owner=' + (if $liveActiveShip? then $liveActiveShip.idcode else 'null') + ' startedAt=' + (if $liveActiveStartedAt? then $liveActiveStartedAt else 'null') + ' age=' + player.age

'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: Cleared orphaned LiveHomeActive home=' + (if $orphanHome? and $orphanHome.knownname? then @$orphanHome.knownname else '?') + ' owner=' + (if $orphanOwner? then $orphanOwner.idcode else 'null')
'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: Re-enqueued orphaned LiveQueued ship ' + $liveOrphanShip.idcode + ' home=' + (if $liveOrphanHome.knownname? then @$liveOrphanHome.knownname else '?')

'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: SLOT FULL (LiveActive=' + global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActive + '/' + global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MaxConcurrentLive + ') at age ' + player.age + ' - scheduling 200-1000ms retry'

do_while.value: $homeScanBudget gt 0 and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActive lt global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MaxConcurrentLive and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveHomesQueue.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: Dropping sell-only request for busy ship ' + $ship.idcode + ' (tradeorders=' + $ship.tradeorders.count + ')'
'[GT-Scheduler] DispatchLiveSearchGo: Sending GT_Search_Go to ' + $ship.idcode + ' (age=' + player.age + ', mode=' + $searchMode + ')'

'[GT-Scheduler] NotifyLiveWaitersTick: Promoted starved waiter ' + $wShip.idcode + ' home=' + (if $homeSector.knownname? then @$homeSector.knownname else '?') + ' waiterAge=' + $waiterAge + ' homeOwnerStale=' + $homeOwnerStale

'[GT-Scheduler] NotifyCacheWaitersTick: Promoted starved cache waiter ' + $cwShip.idcode + ' to live refresh home=' + (if $cacheWaiterHome.knownname? then @$cacheWaiterHome.knownname else '?') + ' age=' + $cacheWaiterAge

'[GT-Scheduler] NotifyMK4LiveWaitersTick: Promoted starved MK4 waiter ' + $mk4wShip.idcode + ' home=' + (if $mk4HomeSector.knownname? then @$mk4HomeSector.knownname else '?') + ' waiterAge=' + $mk4WaiterAge + ' homeOwnerStale=' + $mk4HomeOwnerStale

set_value.name: $cacheEntry
set_value.exact: if $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheActiveShips.{$ship}? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheActiveShips.{$ship} else null

set_value.name: $liveEntry
set_value.exact: if $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips.{$ship} else null

set_value.name: $mk42LiveEntry
set_value.exact: if $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips.{$ship} else null

set_value.name: $mk4LiveEntry
set_value.exact: if $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips.{$ship} else null

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $cacheEntry? and $cacheEntry.$HomeSector? then @$cacheEntry.$HomeSector else (if $cacheEntry? and $cacheEntry.$Params? and $cacheEntry.$Params.$HomeSector? then @$cacheEntry.$Params.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null))

do_if.value: not $starvedWaiter and $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterPassCount? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterPassCount.{$ship}? and @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterPassCount.{$ship} ge 1

do_elseif.value: not $useMK42LivePoolFromCache and not $useMK4LivePoolFromCache and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterStartedAt? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterStartedAt.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveWaiterStartedAt.{$homeSector}.{$ship}?

not $useMK42LivePoolFromCache and not $useMK4LivePoolFromCache and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterFirstParkedAt? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterFirstParkedAt.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterFirstParkedAt.{$homeSector}.{$ship}?

not $useMK42LivePoolFromCache and not $useMK4LivePoolFromCache and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterStartedAt? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterStartedAt.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheWaiterStartedAt.{$homeSector}.{$ship}?

set_value.name: $cacheRequeueParams
set_value.exact: if $cacheEntry? and $cacheEntry.$Params? then @$cacheEntry.$Params else (if $data? and $data.$Params? then @$data.$Params else table[$Ship = $ship])

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchDone: Cache miss with pool=' + $mk3HomeCacheCountOnMiss + ' - requeued cache for ' + $ship.idcode + ' pass=' + ($cacheRetryPass + 1)
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchDone: Cache miss with pool=' + $mk3HomeCacheCountOnMiss + ' - parked cache waiter ' + $ship.idcode + ' (entries exist but per-ship read returned 0)'

set_value.name: $liveParams
set_value.exact: if $cacheEntry? and $cacheEntry.$Params? then @$cacheEntry.$Params else (if $data? and $data.$Params? then @$data.$Params else table[$Ship = $ship])

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchDone: Promoted starved MK4 waiter ' + $ship.idcode + ' to mk4live queue home=' + (if $homeSector? and $homeSector.knownname? then @$homeSector.knownname else '?')
'[GT-Scheduler] HandleSearchDone: Promoted starved waiter ' + $ship.idcode + ' to live queue home=' + (if $homeSector? and $homeSector.knownname? then @$homeSector.knownname else '?')

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $ship? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$ClearanceActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$ClearanceActiveShips.{$ship}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$ClearanceActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$ClearanceActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4LiveEntry? and $mk4LiveEntry.$HomeSector? then @$mk4LiveEntry.$HomeSector else (if $mk4LiveEntry? and $mk4LiveEntry.$Params? and $mk4LiveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector? then @$mk4LiveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null))

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4LiveEntry? and $mk4LiveEntry.$HomeSector? then @$mk4LiveEntry.$HomeSector else (if $mk4LiveEntry? and $mk4LiveEntry.$Params? and $mk4LiveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector? then @$mk4LiveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null))

set_value.name: $homeSector
set_value.exact: if $homeSectorFromDone? and $homeSectorFromDone.exists then $homeSectorFromDone else (if $liveEntry? and $liveEntry.$HomeSector? then @$liveEntry.$HomeSector else (if $liveEntry? and $liveEntry.$Params? and $liveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector? then @$liveEntry.$Params.$HomeSector else (if $ship? then $ship.sector else null)))

do_if.value: $cachePoolUpdated == 'mk4' and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4.{$homeSector}.count gt 0

do_elseif.value: $cachePoolUpdated == 'mk3' and global.$GT_TradeCache? and global.$GT_TradeCache.{$homeSector}? and global.$GT_TradeCache.{$homeSector}.count gt 0

do_if.value: $mk4WakeShips.count gt 0 and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? and @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging

debug_text.text: '[GT-Scheduler] HandleMK4CacheUpdated: Woke ' + $mk4WakeShips.count + ' waiting ships to retry cache home=' + (if $homeSector.knownname? then @$homeSector.knownname else '?') + ' pool=' + $cachePoolUpdated + ' entries=' + $cacheEntryCount + ' maxDist=' + $updatedMaxDistance

set_value.name: $activeLiveHome
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector else null

set_value.name: $activeMK4LiveHome
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK4LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector else null

set_value.name: $activeMK42LiveHome
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips.{$ship}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector? then @global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveActiveShips.{$ship}.$HomeSector else null

do_if.value: $activeMK42LiveHome? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveQueueByHome? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveQueueByHome.{$activeMK42LiveHome}? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveQueueByHome.{$activeMK42LiveHome}.count gt 0 and not global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$MK42LiveHomesQueued.{$activeMK42LiveHome}?
global.$GT_Reservations? and typeof global.$GT_Reservations == datatype.table and global.$GT_Reservations.keys.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-OrphanCleanup] Game start: GT trade due = ' + ($rawVal / 100) + ' Cr (raw=' + $rawVal + '), reservations cleared = ' + $reservationsCleared + ', credits orphans cleaned = ' + $cleanedOnLoad
